messages.content:
Here's the current backlog status:

### Open / Previously Triaged Issues
| # | Topic | Priority | Status |
|---|-------|----------|--------|
| **#43** | WebSockets | P1 — should have | Open |
| **#33** | Auto-updates | P1 — should have | 🔴 Blocked (update strategy decision needed) |
| **#39** | LLM skill | P2 — nice to have | 🔴 Blocked (LLM provider decision needed) |
| **#20** | Lip-sync (arch) | P2 — nice to have | 🔴 Blocked (architectural design needed) |

### Just Shipped (v0.5.14, Mar 8)
Issues #59, #66, #75, #77, #78, #82 — all closed.

---

The live source of truth is GitHub (`mlinnen/mr-pumpkin`). Want me to have **Ralph** do a fresh triage pass to check for any new issues since Feb 27?
📌 Routing to Ralph: Do a fresh triage pass on all open GitHub issues for `mlinnen/mr-pumpkin`. Pull the current open issues, assess priority, and produce an up-to-date backlog summary.

❌ Something went wrong processing your message.
   Try:
   • Try again
   • Run 'squad doctor' for diagnostics

Only **3 open issues** on GitHub right now:

| # | Title | Labels | Last Updated |
|---|-------|--------|--------------|
| **#79** | Create an RSS feed for the mr-pumpkin website blog | `squad`, `go:needs-research`, `squad:jinx` | ~23 hours ago |
| **#76** | A PWA that controls mr-pumpkin | *(none)* | ~2 days ago |
| **#20** | Lip-Syncing | `type:epic` | ~4 days ago |

That's the full backlog — nothing else is open. Want to dig into any of these?

`skill/list_models.py` was created on the **`squad/81-openai-provider`** branch (commit `0fcad0a`) but was **never merged into `main`**. That's why the `.pyc` cache file exists (the branch was checked out locally at some point) but the source file is gone from your current working tree.

To get it back, you can either:
- **Switch to the branch:** `git checkout squad/81-openai-provider`
- **Cherry-pick the file:** `git checkout squad/81-openai-provider -- skill/list_models.py tests/test_list_models.py`

The file provides a `ModelListProvider` abstraction with Gemini and OpenAI backends, plus a CLI (`python -m skill.list_models`).

Done. Both files are now staged on the `dev` branch:
- `skill/list_models.py`
- `tests/test_list_models.py`

Want me to commit them?
